## Changes

- TODO changelog bullets

## Notes

- **No game assets are included.** You must supply your own WCW/nWo Revenge (USA)
  ROM — SHA1 `E1711A2511394B9357B5F1AC8CA5CC17BD674836`. On first launch, click
  **Load ROM** and select it; the launcher validates and remembers it.
- **Windows SmartScreen**: the exe is unsigned, so Windows may warn on first run.
  Click "More info" → "Run anyway".
- **Saves and settings** live in `%LOCALAPPDATA%\RevengeRecompiled\`. Save data is
  compatible across releases unless a release note says otherwise. For a portable
  install, create an empty `portable.txt` next to the exe.
- **GPU**: D3D12 by default. If you hit rendering issues, update your GPU drivers
  first, and please attach `%LOCALAPPDATA%\RevengeRecompiled\RevengeRecompiled.log`
  to any bug report.
- Known issues are tracked in the README.
